assumptions.failure_if_false: WS16 must fail closed because the trust root boundary would be overstated.
assumptions.statement: Current TEVV claims inherit only the reratified 3-of-3 root boundary and must not overread the earlier planned 3-of-5 topology as executed.
stronger_claim_not_made: The original planned 3-of-5 root execution is proven.

assumptions.failure_if_false: WS16 must fail closed because verifier trust would widen beyond the current proof ceiling.
assumptions.statement: Verifier acceptance remains bootstrap-root only, and WS16 does not activate threshold-root verifier acceptance.

assumptions.bounded_scope: WS13 determinism and TEVV parity environments
assumptions.failure_if_false: WS16 must fail closed because local-vs-CI parity would no longer be scoped to proven environments.
assumptions.statement: TEVV parity is bounded to the declared local Windows and GitHub Actions Ubuntu environments on upstream subject head a2cc7ba323cf143def4133d722a7e79dbf35729b.
stronger_claim_not_made: Any environment outside the declared WS13 envelope is automatically compatible.

assumptions.bounded_scope: Imported current bounded keyless verifier surface
assumptions.failure_if_false: WS16 must fail closed because the declared public-trust surface would lose its bounded signed evidence chain.
assumptions.statement: GitHub OIDC, Sigstore keyless signing, and Rekor inclusion remain bound to the declared public verifier manifest surface only.
stronger_claim_not_made: All KT verifier surfaces are keyless-backed.

assumptions.failure_if_false: WS16 must fail closed because cherry-picked evidence would become admissible.
assumptions.statement: A WS16 TEVV pack is incomplete unless both local and CI truth-barrier rows, their subject sets, and the imported bounded keyless surface are all present and hash-bound.
stronger_claim_not_made: A single surviving row is enough to certify the TEVV pack.

assumptions.failure_if_false: WS16 must fail closed because replayability would become ambiguous or secret-backed.
assumptions.statement: Replayability claims must stay bound to declared recipes, manifest verification, and secret-free public surfaces; replay claims do not erase the repo-root import fragility.
stronger_claim_not_made: The repo-root import fragility is fixed.
WS16 trust assumptions constitute external confirmation.
WS16 widens trust or release boundaries beyond the prior proof ceiling.
